t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Primary key. Allocated by Internal.GetPositionID_Bigint. Unique per position.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Primary key. Allocated by Internal.GetPositionID_Bigint. Unique per position. Passthrough from Dim_Position.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables. Passthrough from Dim_Customer.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Group Customer ID - cross-product identity key linking the same person across eToro products/entities. NULL for older accounts predating GCID introduction.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Group Customer ID - cross-product identity key linking the same person across eToro products/entities. NULL for older accounts predating GCID introduction. Passthrough from Dim_Customer.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer login username. Unique (case-insensitive, enforced via UserName_LOWER computed column index).
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer login username. Unique (case-insensitive, enforced via UserName_LOWER computed column index). Passthrough from Dim_Customer.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: When position was persisted (mapped from Occurred in production). Default getutcdate().
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: When position was persisted (mapped from Occurred in production). Default getutcdate(). Passthrough from Dim_Position.
When close was persisted. Passthrough from Dim_Position. 1900-01-01 for open positions.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added '1900-01-01 for open positions' not present in upstream wiki

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: FK to Trade.Instrument. Financial instrument being traded.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: FK to Trade.Instrument. Financial instrument being traded. Passthrough from Dim_Position.
1 = Long/Buy (profit when price rises), 0 = Short/Sell. Passthrough from Dim_Position.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Leverage multiplier (1, 5, 10, etc.). Determines margin and settlement type.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Leverage multiplier (1, 5, 10, etc.). Determines margin and settlement type. Passthrough from Dim_Position.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Position size in units/shares. Fractional lots.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Position size in instrument units (e.g., shares, crypto coins). Fractional lots. Passthrough from Dim_Position.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Paraphrased 'units/shares' to 'instrument units (e.g., shares, crypto coins)' — injected 'crypto coins' not in upstream, changed wording

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Country of residence. FK to Dictionary.Country. Determines regulatory framework, available instruments, and leverage limits. Default=0.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Country of residence. FK to Dictionary.Country. Determines regulatory framework, available instruments, and leverage limits. Default=0. Passthrough from Dim_Customer.

issues.problem: Tagged Tier 2 via SP_Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit_DL_To_Synapse but Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit wiki IS in the bundle and these are direct passthroughs (SELECT f.Bid, f.Ask, etc.). Should be Tier 1 with verbatim upstream descriptions. ConvertRateIsBuy_1 drops NULL semantics and cross-rate logic details.

Upstream says 'Position size in units/shares. Fractional lots.' but wiki paraphrases to 'Position size in instrument units (e.g., shares, crypto coins). Fractional lots.' — rewording and injection of 'crypto coins' not in upstream.
Footer claims '8 T1, 34 T2' but actual element count is 11 T1, 31 T2. Three Tier 1 columns are miscounted.

Tagged Tier 2 but pass through from Dim_Position whose wiki is in the bundle. Should be Tier 1. OpenDateID drops 'E.g., 20260310' and 'NOT a FK to Dim_Date by default'. CloseDateID drops 'Partition column. Always include in WHERE clause.'

issues.column_or_section: Admin_Fee_USD, GracePeriod, InstrumentGroup, InstrumentName_InstrumentGroup, InstrumentType_ID_InstrumentGroup, Units_per_Contract
issues.problem: Config table passthrough columns have upstream wikis in the bundle (Dealing_Islamic_Admin_Fee_Per_Group, Dealing_Islamic_Instruments_Groups, Dealing_Islamic_Units_Per_Contract) but are tagged Tier 2 instead of Tier 1.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Re-run with: (1) Re-tag Bid, Ask, ConvertRateIsBuy_1, ConvertRateIsBuy_0 as Tier 1 using verbatim Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit wiki descriptions — include NULL semantics and cross-rate logic for ConvertRate columns. (2) Fix AmountInUnitsDecimal to verbatim upstream: 'Position size in units/shares. Fractional lots.' (3) Re-tag OpenDateID and CloseDateID as Tier 1 with full upstream descriptions including example value and partition column note. (4) Re-tag config table passthrough columns (Admin_Fee_USD, GracePeriod, InstrumentGroup, InstrumentName_InstrumentGroup, InstrumentType_ID_InstrumentGroup, Units_per_Contract) as Tier 1 with verbatim upstream wiki descriptions. (5) Fix footer tier breakdown to match actual element counts after re-tagging.
